column39: I made this sheet for modding purposes primarily, to compare an original character I made to the 3 base ones and thought I should share it for others to use. You can use it however you want though of course. Enjoy

I put every card that had anything to do with draw in Card Manipulation even if it is something like Escape Plan that is card neutral and put a * for those that are card manipulation but are not necessarily intended as such (like you could use Fiend Fire because it's really good damage and not necessarily because it has the ability to exhaust bad cards like curses or strikes).

It was also rather difficult to organize a lot of those. For instance the archetypes of the Defect, especially the Orbs. The themes were also difficult sometimes (I'm not that familiar with some Computing or machining vocabulary in English for instance) .

Talking about those, I'm not an expert in the game (haven't even beaten ascension 20 with Ironclad yet), so maybe I'm missing stuff for each archetype or more niche archetypes entirely. And the themes are sometimes a bit reaching I guess (I couldn't find a better term than "rawness").

You are welcome to make a copy of this sheet and change every thing you feel like I was wrong about (also hide every irrelevant collumn if you don't want to lose time scrolling through all of them). If something is objectively wrong, feel free to contact me and I'll change it for anyone to benefit from.
I'm Demyr in the STS Discord or Lemnesis on Reddit or Twitter if there's any problem with the sheet.
